book.title: It
book.author: Stephen King
book.summary: A group of children in Derry, Maine confronts a terrifying shape-shifting entity that returns every 27 years.

book.title: The Housemaid
book.author: Freida McFadden
book.summary: A woman takes a job as a housemaid for a wealthy family, only to uncover dark secrets hidden within the house.

book.title: The Inmate
book.author: Freida McFadden
book.summary: A nurse working in a prison discovers that one of the inmates is someone from her past, leading to shocking revelations.

book.title: Red Queen
book.author: Victoria Aveyard
book.summary: In a divided world where blood determines status, a common girl discovers she has powers reserved for the elite.

book.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
book.author: Harper Lee
book.summary: A young girl in the American South witnesses her father defend a Black man falsely accused of a crime, exposing deep racial injustice.

book.title: Children of Blood and Bone
book.author: Tomi Adeyemi
book.summary: A young girl embarks on a journey to restore magic in a land where it has been lost.

book.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.summary: A young wizard discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

book.title: Hurricane Wars
book.author: Thea Guazon
book.summary: A high-stakes adventure in a world torn apart by elemental storms.

book.title: Percy Jackson and the Lightning Thief
book.author: Rick Riordan
book.summary: A boy discovers he is the son of Poseidon and must stop a war among the gods.

book.title: The Troubled Girls of Drago Mirror Academy
book.author: Unknown
book.summary: A magical academy for troubled girls hides secrets darker than its enchanted walls.
